text: Being here, I feel as though I am suspended within the machinery of thought—invited to contemplate the continual process of research and development, the ways in which meaning is constructed and reconstructed. The monotonous affirmations I hear echo the mindless rhythms that sometimes accompany innovative spaces: agreement without substance. Yet in the surround of colored lights and installations, I sense potential lurking beneath surface repetition—a quiet anticipation that insights might spark if only the focus sharpens and questions emerge.
